title: Fastenal Company (FAST) Gains from Reshoring Trends and AI Infrastructure Buildout
excerpt: Brasada Capital Management, an investment management company, released its Q2 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The m...
content_html:
Soumya Eswaran

Thu, July 23, 2026 at 7:15 AM PDT 3 min read

Brasada Capital Management, an investment management company, released its Q2 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The market landscape in the past quarter has been significantly influenced by the rapid advancements in artificial intelligence (AI), overshadowing other concerns like geopolitical conflicts. Currently, the AI boom is so substantial that it affects the entire market cycle. Key factors include a 400% increase in memory demand due to AI, a slow supply response that takes years to catch up, and minimal demand destruction. The Fund's investment strategy focuses on essential infrastructure that maintains competitive advantages, rather than chasing speculative momentum. The firm emphasizes secular long-term growth, regardless of which AI technologies prevail. In addition, please check the Strategy's top five holdings to know its best picks in 2026.

In its Q2 2026 investor letter, Brasada Capital Management highlighted Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST). Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) is a leading industrial and construction supply distributor that offers fasteners, tools, safety equipment, and inventory management solutions. On July 22, 2026, Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) closed at $45.33 per share, reflecting a market capitalization of $52.02 billion. Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) posted a one-month return of -3.39%, while its shares lost 5.42% over the past 52 weeks.

Brasada Capital Management stated the following regarding Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) in its Q2 2026 investor update:

"Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) distributes a wide array of products including fasteners, tools, safety equipment, and janitorial supplies, but at its core Fastenal is an outsourced procurement and supply chain partner for the industrial sector, helping to seamlessly manage customer inventory. Fastenal embeds itself within its customers' operations through local branches, automated industrial vending machines, FASTBins equipped with RFID technology, and dedicated Onsite locations where full-time Fastenal employees work directly on the customer's manufacturing floor. By handling the complexities of sourcing and replenishment, Fastenal ensures parts are always available, allowing clients to focus on their core competencies without the risk of costly production delays caused by a missing screw.

What makes Fastenal a high-quality business is that their customers have come to depend on them for cheap, mission critical parts – any delay or having the wrong type of fastener in inventory can mean millions of dollars in costs for the manufacturers in the form of slowdowns, shutdowns, poor product quality, or recalls. If you're missing a $0.30 screw on a $10K or $10M machine, you're just not shipping that machine, and if you have too many of those screws laying around, you're likely wasting space and money. As such, Fastenal commands premium pricing power, high returns on capital, and reoccurring revenue. On top of that, Fastenal runs a decentralized, highly frugal culture that empowers branch managers to run their operations like entrepreneurs, heavily tying their incentives to localized growth and strict margin discipline..." (Click here to read the full text)

sentences.en: "Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) distributes a wide array of products including fasteners, tools, safety equipment, and janitorial supplies, but at its core Fastenal is an outsourced procurement and supply chain partner for the industrial sector, helping to seamlessly manage customer inventory.
sentences.zh: “Fastenal 公司（纳斯达克股票代码：FAST）分销各种产品，包括紧固件、工具、安全设备和清洁用品，但其核心是 Fastenal 是工业领域的外包采购和供应链合作伙伴，帮助无缝管理客户库存。

sentences.en: Fastenal embeds itself within its customers' operations through local branches, automated industrial vending machines, FASTBins equipped with RFID technology, and dedicated Onsite locations where full-time Fastenal employees work directly on the customer's manufacturing floor.
sentences.zh: Fastenal 通过当地分支机构、自动化工业自动售货机、配备 RFID 技术的 FASTBins 以及专门的现场位置（Fastenal 的全职员工直接在客户的制造车间工作）将自身融入到客户的运营中。

sentences.en: By handling the complexities of sourcing and replenishment, Fastenal ensures parts are always available, allowing clients to focus on their core competencies without the risk of costly production delays caused by a missing screw.
sentences.zh: 通过处理采购和补货的复杂性，Fastenal 可确保零件始终可用，从而使客户能够专注于其核心竞争力，而无需承担因缺少螺丝而造成代价高昂的生产延误的风险。

sentences.en: What makes Fastenal a high-quality business is that their customers have come to depend on them for cheap, mission critical parts – any delay or having the wrong type of fastener in inventory can mean millions of dollars in costs for the manufacturers in the form of slowdowns, shutdowns, poor product quality, or recalls.
sentences.zh: Fastenal 之所以成为一家高质量企业，是因为他们的客户已经开始依赖他们提供廉价的关键任务零件 - 任何延误或库存中紧固件类型错误都可能意味着制造商损失数百万美元，表现为减速、停工、产品质量差或召回。

sentences.en: If you're missing a $0.30 screw on a $10K or $10M machine, you're just not shipping that machine, and if you have too many of those screws laying around, you're likely wasting space and money.
sentences.zh: 如果您在一台价值 1 万美元或 1000 万美元的机器上缺少一颗 0.30 美元的螺丝，那么您就不会运送该机器，而如果您周围有太多这些螺丝，您可能会浪费空间和金钱。

sentences.en: As such, Fastenal commands premium pricing power, high returns on capital, and reoccurring revenue.
sentences.zh: 因此，Fastenal 拥有优质的定价能力、高资本回报率和经常性收入。

sentences.en: On top of that, Fastenal runs a decentralized, highly frugal culture that empowers branch managers to run their operations like entrepreneurs, heavily tying their incentives to localized growth and strict margin discipline..."
sentences.zh: 最重要的是，Fastenal 运营着一种去中心化、高度节俭的文化，使分公司经理能够像企业家一样经营业务，将他们的激励措施与本地化增长和严格的利润纪律紧密联系在一起……”

content_html_zh:
苏米娅·埃斯瓦兰

太平洋夏令时间 2026 年 7 月 23 日星期四上午 7:15 阅读时间 3 分钟

投资管理公司 Brasada Capital Management 发布了 2026 年第二季度投资者信函。 该信函的副本可在此处下载。 过去一个季度的市场格局受到人工智能（AI）快速发展的显着影响，掩盖了地缘政治冲突等其他担忧。 目前，人工智能热潮如此之大，以至于影响了整个市场周期。 关键因素包括 AI 带来的内存需求增长 400%、供应反应缓慢（需要数年时间才能赶上）以及需求破坏最小化。 该基金的投资策略侧重于保持竞争优势的重要基础设施，而不是追逐投机势头。 无论哪种人工智能技术占主导地位，该公司都强调长期增长。 此外，请查看该策略的前五名持股，以了解其 2026 年的最佳选择。

Brasada Capital Management 在其 2026 年第二季度投资者信中重点介绍了 Fastenal Company（纳斯达克股票代码：FAST）。 Fastenal Company（纳斯达克股票代码：FAST）是一家领先的工业和建筑供应分销商，提供紧固件、工具、安全设备和库存管理解决方案。 2026 年 7 月 22 日，Fastenal Company（纳斯达克股票代码：FAST）收盘价为每股 45.33 美元，市值为 520.2 亿美元。 Fastenal Company（纳斯达克股票代码：FAST）公布的一个月回报率为-3.39%，而其股价在过去 52 周内下跌了 5.42%。

Brasada Capital Management 在其 2026 年第二季度投资者更新中就 Fastenal Company（纳斯达克股票代码：FAST）发表了以下声明：

“Fastenal 公司（纳斯达克股票代码：FAST）分销各种产品，包括紧固件、工具、安全设备和清洁用品，但其核心是 Fastenal 是工业领域的外包采购和供应链合作伙伴，帮助无缝管理客户库存。 Fastenal 通过当地分支机构、自动化工业自动售货机、配备 RFID 技术的 FASTBins 以及专门的现场位置（Fastenal 的全职员工直接在客户的制造车间工作）将自身融入到客户的运营中。 通过处理采购和补货的复杂性，Fastenal 可确保零件始终可用，从而使客户能够专注于其核心竞争力，而无需承担因缺少螺丝而造成代价高昂的生产延误的风险。 Fastenal 之所以成为一家高质量企业，是因为他们的客户已经开始依赖他们提供廉价的关键任务零件 - 任何延误或库存中紧固件类型错误都可能意味着制造商损失数百万美元，表现为减速、停工、产品质量差或召回。 如果您在一台价值 1 万美元或 1000 万美元的机器上缺少一颗 0.30 美元的螺丝，那么您就不会运送该机器，而如果您周围有太多这些螺丝，您可能会浪费空间和金钱。 因此，Fastenal 拥有优质的定价能力、高资本回报率和经常性收入。 最重要的是，Fastenal 运营着一种去中心化、高度节俭的文化，使分公司经理能够像企业家一样经营业务，将他们的激励措施与本地化增长和严格的利润纪律紧密联系在一起……” （点击此处阅读全文）
